description: Log in to Moodle (admin/Admin1234!) at http://localhost/moodle. In the "Introduction to Biology" (BIO101) course, create a Workshop activity named "Lab Report Peer Review" with the description "Submit your cell biology lab report and peer-review your classmates' work using the defined assessment criteria." Configure the activity with an Accumulative grading strategy, a submission grade of 80, and an assessment grade of 20. Define the assessment form with three criteria: "Scientific Accuracy - Correctness of experimental methodology, data recording, and results interpretation" (Max grade 10, Weight 1), "Writing Quality - Clarity of expression, logical organization, grammar, and adherence to scientific writing conventions" (Max grade 10, Weight 1), and "Data Presentation - Quality and labeling of tables, figures, charts, and appropriateness of statistical analysis" (Max grade 10, Weight 1). Finally, switch the workshop to the Submission phase.
